title: UCSF OSHER CENTER FOR INTEGRATIVE HEALTH - Yelp
content: I booked an appointment and had to wait 2.5 months to be seen. “The practitioner I met (via Zoom), Kathleen Cavanaugh, gets 5 stars.”

title: ExperienceFirst - San Francisco - All You SHOULD Know Before ...

[(415) 798-1087](sms:4157981087)[256 Sutter St, Floor 4](https://www.google.com/maps?daddr=256%20Sutter%20St+San%20Francisco+CA+94108)[Book Now](https://book.squareup.com/appointments/9pibax8e6wtdpa/location/L2PE30E0C0XXF/services). ![Image 1: Stylish photo of a woman with long hair](https://sanctuarysalonsf.com/_astro/model1.C0CE4uwP_Z1j1F3g.webp). # No tips,. ## Sanctuary Salon is a collective of like-minded professionals providing an inclusive, safe space for anyone to receive high quality hair services. ## Carving a. We are a gender-neutral, gratuity-free business that charges an hourly price for our artist’s time. The price you see when you book is the only price there is, allowing us to make the best decisions for your hair in the time and budget available.
